title: Chinese Buddhist: Chuanxin Fayao (Huangbo) (1)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Chuanxin Fayao (Huangbo)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Chuanxin Fayao (Huangbo)

translation.text: From Chuanxin Fayao (Huangbo): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
